sections.heading: Executive Summary
sections.body: A real-time scan of public sector journeyman plumber job openings across Illinois government agencies — Cook County, State of Illinois, CTA, Metra, Forest Preserves, and municipal governments. The market is tight for government plumber roles with only one active posting at the county level, but the pay is exceptional at $60.50/hr for Cook County positions.

subsections.heading: 1. Cook County — Plumber (Dept of Facilities Management)
subsections.body: Req 00138854. Location: Criminal Court Administration, 2650 S. California Ave, Chicago. Full-time, 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM. Union: COUPE - PLMBR 130. Pay: $60.50/hr ($125,840/yr). Posted April 23, 2026. Closes May 7, 2026 (5 days remaining).

subsections.heading: 2. State of Illinois — Plumber (CMS) — Central/Southern Region
subsections.body: Permanent posting under Central Management Services covering state fairgrounds in Springfield and other facilities in central/southern counties. Journeyman level. Requires experience to qualify as a journeyman plumber. Travel required. Apply via CMS100 form.

subsections.heading: 3. Forest Preserves of Cook County — Plumber (Recently Listed)
subsections.body: Was listed on LinkedIn (as of late April 2026) as an active position under Facilities and Fleet Department. Not currently showing on the FPCC Taleo portal, but may re-open. Worth contacting HR directly.

sections.heading: Agencies Checked — No Current Openings
sections.body: The following public agencies were searched and currently have no plumber-specific postings. Worth re-checking regularly as positions cycle:

subsections.heading: CTA (Chicago Transit Authority)
subsections.body: No plumber openings. CTA's external portal had zero results for 'plumber'. They do hire trades regularly for rail maintenance though. Check back or monitor their upcoming opportunities page.

subsections.heading: Metra
subsections.body: No plumber openings. Metra's career site showed Electrician, Communication Maintainer, and Mechanical roles but no plumber. They hire skilled trades for facility maintenance periodically.

subsections.heading: Cook County Health
subsections.body: No plumber openings. CCH portal (section 200) returned zero results for plumber. They do employ facility maintenance trades at Stroger, Provident, and other hospitals.

subsections.heading: Forest Preserves (Current Portal)
subsections.body: Currently showing Maintenance Mechanic ($89K/yr), Fleet Technician ($72K/yr), and Landscape roles. No plumber listed on the active postings.

sections.heading: What to Emphasize in Applications & Interviews
sections.body: For a union journeyman coming from the City of Chicago applying to these public sector roles, here is what to lead with in resumes, cover letters, and interviews:

subsections.heading: City of Chicago credential
subsections.body: Already holds a City of Chicago Journeyman license and works in a municipal union environment - the single strongest selling point. Government hiring managers want someone who understands government workflows, prevailing wage compliance, and institutional culture.

subsections.heading: Union journeyman status
subsections.body: The Cook County posting (PLMBR 130) is a COUPE union position. No cultural adjustment needed. Emphasize understanding of collective bargaining, union safety protocols, and journeyman-level independence.

subsections.heading: Municipal facility experience
subsections.body: City of Chicago facilities means large institutional systems. Cook County criminal court building is the same world. Highlight commercial/industrial plumbing experience.

subsections.heading: Licenses and certs
subsections.body: List City of Chicago Journeyman license, State of Illinois Journeyman license, OSHA certs, backflow certs, and valid driver's license prominently.

subsections.heading: Stability and longevity
subsections.body: Government positions value long tenure. Frame City of Chicago service as proof of reliability.

subsections.heading: Cook County application urgency
subsections.body: Posting closes May 7. Apply immediately via Taleo account. Veterans preference applies if applicable (attach DD214).

sections.heading: How to Apply for the Cook County Position

subsections.heading: Step 1
subsections.body: Go to cookcountyil.taleo.net and select 'Offices Under The President' section (section 100).

subsections.heading: Step 2
subsections.body: Enter keyword 'plumber' or Requisition ID '00138854' and click Search for Jobs.

subsections.heading: Step 3
subsections.body: Click on the posted title and click Apply. Create an account or sign in.

subsections.heading: Step 4
subsections.body: Complete the application and submit before May 7, 2026 at 11:59 PM.

sections.heading: Union Journeyman — Regional Private Sector Options
sections.body: If public sector doesn't pan out immediately, union signatory contractors under Local 130 are the next-best option for experienced journeymen:

subsections.heading: Local 130 Union Hall
subsections.body: Call (312) 421-1010 and ask the business agent which signatory contractors are currently taking journeyman books. Local 130 covers Chicago and Cook, DuPage, Kane, Lake, McHenry, Will, Kankakee, and Iroquois counties.

subsections.heading: PlumberJobsUSA.com
subsections.body: Handpicked journeyman plumber job listings across Illinois and the US. Many listings specifically seeking licensed journeymen.

subsections.heading: Indeed / ZipRecruiter
subsections.body: Set up alerts for 'journeyman plumber' in Illinois. Currently 415+ plumber jobs across the state, many union-compatible.
